sections.name: AntMatutinumM
lines: With the joy * of the whole earth is mount Sion founded, the city of the great king.;;47
Mercy * and truth have met each other: justice and peace have kissed.;;84
Exalt ye * the Lord our God, and adore at his tent: for he is holy.;;98

sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: O bless * the Lord in his works, for he has clothed Mary with a robe of salvation, and wrapped her in a mantle of justice.

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. God chose Mary and forechose her, and created her in the Holy Ghost.
* Therefore no defilement touched her.
V. The Lord gave Mary the defence of his salvation, and upheld her with his right hand.
R. Therefore no defilement touched her.

sections.name: Lectio6
lines: @Sancti/12-08:Lectio5:s/Verily, .*//s

sections.name: Lectio7
lines: @Sancti/12-08:Lectio5:s/.*Verily,/Verily,/s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. O Magnify the Lord with me
* For the mercy of the Lord is great upon me.
V. The prince of this world have nothing in me.
R. For the mercy of the Lord is great upon me.

sections.name: Lectio9
lines: @Sancti/12-08:Lectio7:s/Hail, stately.*//s

sections.name: Lectio10
lines: @Sancti/12-08:Lectio7:s/.* Hail, /Hail, /s s/$/~/
@Sancti/12-08:Lectio8:s/Hail, O purest.*//s

sections.name: Lectio11
lines: @Sancti/12-08:Lectio8:s/.* Hail, O purest /Hail, O purest /s

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. Who is so great a God as our God?
* God forechose me, and made my way stainless.
V. My spirit hath rejoiced in God my saviour
R. God forechose me, and made my way stainless.

sections.name: Responsory12
lines: R. The Lord shows us the holy city Jerusalem, having the brightness of God
* and her light is like a stone most precious, as clear as crystal.
V. The Lord hath desired the daughter of Jerusalem, adorned with her jewels.
R. And her light is like a stone most precious, as clear as crystal.
